ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or bio of the author */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the author */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was posted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment */,
  "comment_rating" REAL /* Rating of the comment */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "query_term" TEXT /* Search term used in the query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date and time the search was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of search results returned */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video the history entry is associated with */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_history_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the video */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time the video was published */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the video */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the video */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the video */,
  "query_term" TEXT /* Search query term associated with the video */,
  "label_order" INTEGER /* Order of the label in the search results */,
  "task_order" INTEGER /* Order of the task in the search results */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail of the video */,
  "views_by_country" TEXT /* Views by country */,
  "average_watch_time" REAL /* Average watch time of the video */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video version */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_versions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video associated with this rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Actual rating */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_ratings_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
